claim_boundary: Development approximation of independent dual-receptor computational Docking geometry; not binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, or Docking Gold.
outer_split: frozen outer_fold from v6_supervised1507.tsv; whole parent
selection: inner whole-parent CV on outer-train only
m2: weighted structure Ridge alpha=10; outer-train residual inputs are whole-parent cross-fitted
m4_features: outer-train-only PCA of pooled ESM embedding
cross-fitted M2 prediction during training and full-outer-train M2 prediction at test
